## What & why

Briefly describe the change and the motivation. Link any related issue (`Closes #123`).

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Docs / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes (and I added/updated tests for the change)
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` is clean
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Checks/connectors **fail safe** (ESCALATE/BLOCK on uncertainty — never silent ALLOW)
- [ ] I did not change the provenance record format without a chain-version note in `CHANGELOG.md`
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or config changed

## Notes for reviewers

Anything reviewers should focus on, trade-offs, or follow-ups.
